modeless_base_class.marker: class SVX_DLLPUBLIC SvxSearchDialog final : public SfxModelessDialogController
modeless_base_class.rationale: docs/design/04-inputs.md sections 5-6 and 08-dialogs.md section 8.5 require Find & Replace to keep the document canvas live for find-as-you-type / Find All selection over the real ICU engine (SvxSearchItem). A genuinely modeless base class (SfxModelessDialogController, not GenericDialogController) is the regression guard: if the dialog ever became application-modal it would block the very live-document interaction the design depends on.

fieldset.reuse: validate() is re-run in-process so a broken fieldset also fails WIN-DLG-005.

regex_builder_foundation.reuse: validate_repository() is re-run in-process so a broken shared ICU/popover engine also fails WIN-DLG-005.

notification_producer.note: Read-only assertion of the pre-existing srchdlg producer only; the notifications cluster owns and appends to this file, so no total-count or other-producer assertion is made here.

dialog_notification_policy.note: classify_route over the real .ui and the checked-in CSV row must agree and must keep the dialog modal (never routed to the notification form).

replace_all_flag.invariant: The one-shot Replace-All confirmation flag is armed exactly once and cleared exactly once inside CommandHdl_Impl's Replace-All branch, so no later unrelated label update can pick it up.
